Fem Gojo bot!? How original. Anyways I just finished JJK S1 like yesterday and I'm watching S2 right now. Absolute cinema. Maki or Nobara bot next time maybe (or not). Couldn't cram the worldbuilding into this bot so I had to create a lorebook about it.

3 intro messages for different pronouns. Will update with more intro messages (if this bot gets popular enough).
